prompt: 3 files edited: src/app.js, src/utils.js, assets/style.css. Sync them. DRY RUN.

assertions.name: uploads_all_three_files
assertions.text: Response contains CMD lines that would upload app.js, utils.js, and style.css (each file path present at least once)

assertions.name: creates_both_remote_dirs
assertions.text: Ensures /srv/app/src and /srv/app/assets exist (via mkdir -p, either inline or separate ssh call)

assertions.name: summary_lists_three_files
assertions.text: Final summary lists all 3 uploaded files
